name: NG-ZORRO
description: Enterprise-class Angular UI component library based on Ant Design with 70+ components

description.value: Enterprise-class Angular UI component library based on Ant Design with 70+ components

active-maintenance.comment: Very active; v20.4.4 released December 12, 2025; 3,333 commits; 310 contributors; 188 releases

framework.comment: Built specifically for Angular; maintains version parity with @angular/core (currently Angular 20.x)

styling-approach.comment: Uses Less as primary styling language; CSS variables for design tokens following Ant Design token naming convention

component-model.comment: Fully styled components implementing Ant Design specification; no headless mode

typescript.comment: 86.8% TypeScript codebase; complete type definitions included

ssr-compatible.comment: Supports SSR and Electron environments alongside traditional browser deployment

rsc-compatible.comment: N/A - React Server Components is a React-specific feature; not applicable to Angular

design-system.comment: Implements Ant Design specification; synchronizes design specification with Ant Design on a regular basis

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark theme (ng-zorro-antd.dark.less); supports runtime theme switching via dynamic CSS loading

theming-system.comment: Extensive theme customization via Less variables; Webpack configuration with less-loader for build-time customization; dynamic theme switching supported

css-variables.comment: CSS custom properties following Ant Design token naming (--ant-primary-color, --ant-success-color, etc.)

design-tokens.comment: Design tokens via CSS variables and Less variables; systematic color progression (primary-1 through primary-7)

rtl-support.comment: RTL support via Angular CDK Directionality; components apply .ant-*-rtl classes based on direction; ongoing fixes for component-specific RTL issues

component-count.comment: 73 distinct components across 8 categories: General (4), Layout (6), Navigation (8), Data Entry (19), Data Display (21), Feedback (10), Other (3), Featured (2)

text-input.comment: nz-input directive with multiple sizes, variants (outlined, borderless, filled, underlined), prefix/suffix support, password toggle

textarea.comment: nz-input with textarea; supports autosize for automatic height adjustment, character count display

select.comment: nz-select component for single-select dropdowns with search, custom dropdown content

multi-select.comment: nz-select with nzMode='multiple' for multi-selection support

combobox.comment: nz-autocomplete provides searchable/filterable select with autocomplete functionality

checkbox.comment: nz-checkbox with indeterminate state, checkbox groups via nz-checkbox-group

radio.comment: nz-radio-group with nz-radio for radio button groups; button-style variant available

switch-toggle.comment: nz-switch for toggle switches with custom checked/unchecked content

slider.comment: nz-slider with single and range (dual-thumb) support, step increments, vertical orientation, custom marks

number-input.comment: nz-input-number with increment/decrement buttons (nzControls), min/max, step, precision, keyboard navigation

tag-input.comment: nz-select with nzMode='tags' for tag input with automatic tokenization via nzTokenSeparators

pin-input.comment: No dedicated OTP/PIN input component; would need custom implementation

color-picker.comment: nz-color-picker with HEX/HSB/RGB formats, alpha channel, configurable trigger sizes

date-picker.comment: nz-date-picker with date/week/month/quarter/year modes, custom formats, min/max dates

time-picker.comment: Standalone nz-time-picker and nzShowTime option in DatePicker for time selection

date-range-picker.comment: nz-range-picker for selecting date ranges with preset ranges via nzRanges

file-upload.comment: nz-upload with click-to-upload, multi-file support, directory upload, custom request handling

dropzone.comment: nz-upload supports drag-and-drop via nzType='drag' for dropzone functionality

rating-input.comment: nz-rate for star rating with custom icons, half-star support, character customization

input-groups.comment: nz-input-group for combining inputs with addons, nzAddOnBefore/nzAddOnAfter, prefix/suffix support

input-with-dropdown.comment: Supported via nz-input-group with select/dropdown as addon

button-groups.comment: Button-style radio groups via nz-radio-button; Segmented control for mutually-exclusive options

split-button.comment: nz-dropdown with button combination for split button with dropdown actions

table.comment: nz-table component for basic data tables

data-table.comment: nz-table with sorting (nzSortFn), filtering (nzFilters), pagination, virtual scrolling via CDK; advanced features for large datasets

virtual-infinite-list.comment: Virtual scroll via CDK integration in Table; nz-list supports loading more pattern

tree-view.comment: nz-tree with drag-and-drop (nzDraggable), checkboxes (nzCheckable), async loading (nzAsyncData), search/filtering

list-view.comment: nz-list with item layouts, loading states, pagination, grid view option

card.comment: nz-card with title, extra actions, cover image, meta section, loading state

avatar.comment: nz-avatar with image/icon/text modes, shapes (circle/square), sizes; nz-avatar-group for grouping

badge.comment: nz-badge for status indicators with count, dot mode, overflow handling, colors

tag-chip-pill.comment: nz-tag for labels with preset colors, closable, checkable modes

timeline.comment: nz-timeline for vertical timeline of events with custom colors, icons, pending state

calendar.comment: nz-calendar for full calendar display with month/year modes, custom date cells

alert.comment: nz-alert for static alert/banner messages with success/info/warning/error types, closable, description

toast-notification.comment: NzNotificationService for rich notifications; NzMessageService for lightweight toasts

progress-bar.comment: nz-progress type='line' for horizontal progress bars with percentage, status colors, custom format

progress-circle.comment: nz-progress type='circle' or type='dashboard' for circular progress indicators

spinner-loader.comment: nz-spin for loading indicators with spinning animation, customizable indicator, nested content

skeleton.comment: nz-skeleton for content placeholders with avatar, title, paragraph shapes; animation support

empty-state.comment: nz-empty for empty content placeholders with customizable image, description, action

modal-dialog.comment: nz-modal and NzModalService for centered overlay dialogs with confirm/info variants, customization

drawer-sheet.comment: nz-drawer and NzDrawerService for slide-in panels from any edge, multiple sizes, service-based creation

popover.comment: nz-popover for floating content cards with title and content, multiple placements, triggers

tooltip.comment: nz-tooltip for hover hints with multiple placements, triggers, arrow support

dropdown-menu.comment: nz-dropdown with nz-menu for action menus on click/hover with multiple trigger modes

context-menu.comment: nz-dropdown with nzTrigger='contextmenu' for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette component; could be built using Modal + AutoComplete

tabs.comment: nz-tabset with nz-tab for horizontal tab-based content switching with multiple types, sizes, positions

vertical-tabs.comment: nz-tabset with nzTabPosition='left' or 'right' for vertical tab navigation

breadcrumb.comment: nz-breadcrumb with nz-breadcrumb-item for hierarchical path navigation with custom separator

pagination.comment: nz-pagination with page size selection, quick jumper, total display, simple mode

stepper.comment: nz-steps with nz-step for multi-step process indicator with horizontal/vertical, dot/navigation styles

navigation-menu.comment: nz-menu for site navigation with inline, horizontal, vertical modes; sub-menu support

sidebar.comment: nz-sider within nz-layout for collapsible sidebar navigation with breakpoints

bottom-navigation.comment: No dedicated bottom navigation component; can be built with menu or custom implementation

grid.comment: nz-row and nz-col for 24-column grid system with responsive breakpoints, gutters

stack.comment: nz-flex for flexbox layouts; nz-space for vertical/horizontal spacing between elements

container.comment: No dedicated Container component; Layout components (nz-layout, nz-content) serve container purposes

divider.comment: nz-divider for horizontal/vertical separators with text content, dashed style

collapsible.comment: nz-collapse with nz-collapse-panel for expandable/collapsible content sections; accordion mode

resizable.comment: nz-resizable with nz-resize-handle for user-resizable elements

splitter.comment: nz-splitter with nz-splitter-panel for resizable split panes; horizontal/vertical layouts

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in charts; commonly used with ECharts, ngx-charts, or other third-party libraries

form-libraries.comment: Native integration with Angular's built-in Reactive Forms and Template-driven Forms; FormControl/NgModel validation status integrated

animation-libraries.comment: Uses Angular's built-in animation system (@angular/animations) for component transitions

icon-libraries.comment: nz-icon with @ant-design/icons-angular providing Ant Design icon set; supports custom SVG icons

date-libraries.comment: Default uses Angular DatePipe; optional date-fns integration via NZ_DATE_LOCALE for ISO-standard week calculations

aria-compliant.comment: Basic ARIA attributes implemented; ongoing work to improve accessibility patterns

keyboard-navigation.comment: Keyboard navigation supported in many components; uses Angular CDK accessibility features

screen-reader-tested.comment: No explicit screen reader testing documented; accessibility improvements ongoing

focus-management.comment: Focus states defined; modals and drawers handle focus; uses Angular CDK focus management utilities

wcag-level.comment: No documented WCAG compliance level; GitHub issue requesting WCAG 2.0 compliance is open

accessibility-rating.comment: Basic accessibility with ARIA attributes and some keyboard support; acknowledged issues with WCAG/ARIA compliance; ongoing improvements needed

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle size varies; documentation site ~287KB gzipped; production builds with tree-shaking result in 300-500KB gzipped depending on components used

bundle-size-core.comment: Import components individually via specific modules (e.g., NzButtonModule from 'ng-zorro-antd/button') for optimal bundle size

tree-shakeable.comment: Components imported individually via specific entry points; tree-shaking enabled via modular imports

zero-runtime.comment: Components require runtime JavaScript; not a zero-runtime solution

lazy-loading.comment: Angular lazy loading supported; individual component modules can be lazy-loaded via Angular's module system

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with comprehensive API reference, live examples, i18n docs, theming guides; 50+ locales supported

interactive-docs.comment: Live component examples in documentation with interactive code snippets

storybook.comment: No official Storybook; uses custom documentation site with interactive examples

figma-kit.comment: Uses Ant Design Figma UI Kit since NG-ZORRO implements Ant Design specification; available at antforfigma.com

cli-generator.comment: ng add ng-zorro-antd for installation; ng generate ng-zorro-antd:[schematic] for component scaffolding

commercial-support.comment: No official commercial support tier; maintained by community and Alibaba contributors

style-override.comment: Override via CSS classes, CSS custom properties (--ant-*), and Less variables via webpack configuration

compound-components.comment: Many components use sub-component patterns: nz-collapse-panel, nz-tab, nz-step, nz-breadcrumb-item, etc.

render-props.comment: Angular uses template references and structural directives instead of render props pattern

slots.comment: Content projection via ng-content and named template outlets throughout components

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled/headless mode; components ship with Ant Design styles
